summary: Completed frontend bug fix verification testing for Moon Cinema Tycoon V44. Verified 4 critical bug fixes: (1) Marketing button navigation now correctly routes to /marketing index page instead of /current-movies or specific movie pages. (2) Series Creator Browse Talent button navigates to /talent. (3) All Cinemas tabs (4) functional. (4) TV Networks banner always visible with all 5 tabs working. Streaming tier-change button test skipped due to fresh game state (no streaming services exist yet).
passed_tests: Marketing button navigation - Routes to /marketing index page (bug fix verified)
Marketing Plans header displays correctly on /marketing page
Series Creator Browse Talent Database button - Navigates to /talent page
Cinemas page - All 4 tabs functional (deals, manager, mine, calendar)
Cinemas Calendar tab - Shows release calendar
TV Networks page - TV Manager banner always visible (bug fix verified)
TV Networks page - All 5 tabs functional (networks, mine, mycable, cable, manager)
Dashboard loads successfully after studio creation
All navigation buttons present and clickable (marketing, streaming, cinemas, tv-networks, series-maker)

untested_features: Streaming tier-change button clickability (requires streaming service with licensed movies)
Exclusive licensing lock enforcement (requires movies licensed to rival services - best tested after ~12 weeks of simulation)
Duplicate licensing prevention (requires multiple streaming services with licensing attempts)
notes.testing_approach: Used Playwright browser automation with coordinate-based clicks for React Native Web components. Fresh game state created with Conglomerate ($50B) studio.
notes.known_warnings: Shadow/textShadow deprecation warnings present but harmless (as noted in review request)
